revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template
  |id=R to project namespace
  |name=To a project page
  |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]]
  |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]
  |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''.
  |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}}
  |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}}
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template
  |id=R to project namespace
  |name=To a project page
  |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]]
  |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]
  |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''.
  |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}}
  |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}}
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template
  |id=R to project namespace
  |name=To a project page
  |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]]
  |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]
  |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''.
  |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}}
  |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}}
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template
  |id=R to project namespace
  |name=To a project page
  |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]]
  |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]
  |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''.
  |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}}
  |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}}
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template
  |id=R to project namespace
  |name=To a project page
  |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]]
  |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]
  |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''.
  |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}}
  |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}}
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template
  |id=R to project namespace
  |name=To a project page
  |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]]
  |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]]
  |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''.
  |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}}
  |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}}
  |printworthy=no
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}} 
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template |id=R to project namespace |name=To a project page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]] |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]] |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''. |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}} |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}} |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]]}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template |id=R to project namespace |name=To a project page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]] |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]] |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''. |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}} |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}} |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template |id=R to project namespace |name=To a project page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]] |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]] |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''. |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}} |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}} |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{#if: {{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R to project namespace|yes|}} |{{Redirect template |id=R to project namespace |name=To a project page |from=''any'' page '''inside''' or '''outside''' of [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project (Wikipedia: or WP:) space]] |to=any page in the project [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespace]] |info=The above category link leads to a list of redirects from inside project space. Redirects from outside project space are automatically sorted to '''{{cat|Redirects to project namespace}}'''. |wikipedia category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||Redirects to Wikipedia project pages}} |other category={{#ifeq:{{{nocat}}}|yes||{{{other category|Redirects to project namespace}}}}} |printworthy=no }}<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{BASEPAGENAME}}|R to project namespace||{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACE:{{#invoke:redirect|main|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}|{{ns:4}}||{{info|image=Stop hand nuvola.svg|{{error|The above template is being used incorrectly. Please remove it from this redirect.}}}}}}}}</includeonly>}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Pages with incorrectly transcluded templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
